lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਰਮੰਤ ਦੂਖ ਨਾਸਹਿ ਰਿਦ ਭਇਅੰਤ ਸਾਂਤਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gun ramant dookh naaseh rid bheiant saant |3|
lines.english: Uttering His Glorious Praises, suffering is eradicated, and the heart becomes tranquil and calm. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਾ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਉ ਰਸਨਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤ ॥੪॥੪॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: amritaa ras peeo rasanaa naanak har rang raat |4|4|15|
lines.english: Drink in the Sweet, Sublime Ambrosial Nectar, O Nanak, and be imbued with the Love of the Lord. ||4||4||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਜਨਾ ਸੰਤ ਆਉ ਮੇਰੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saajanaa sant aau merai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O friends, O Saints, come to me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਚਰਨ ਧਰਉ ਮਾਥੈ ਚਾਂਦਨਾ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਹੋਇ ਅੰਧੇਰੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sant charan dhrau maathai chaandanaa grihi hoe andherai |2|
lines.english: Touch your forehead to the feet of the Saints, and your dark household shall be illumined. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨਦਾ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਇ ਮੰਗਲ ਕਸਮਲਾ ਮਿਟਿ ਜਾਹਿ ਪਰੇਰੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aanadaa gun gaae mangal kasamalaa mitt jaeh parerai |1|
lines.english: Singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord with pleasure and joy, the sins will be erased and thrown away. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਕਮਲੁ ਬਿਗਸੈ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਭਜਉ ਪੇਖਿ ਨੇਰੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sant prasaad kamal bigasai gobind bhjau pekh nerai |3|
lines.english: By the Grace of the Saints, the heart-lotus blossoms forth. Vibrate and meditate on the Lord of the Universe, and see Him near at hand. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਤੇ ਸੰਤ ਪਾਏ ਵਾਰਿ ਵਾਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਉਹ ਬੇਰੈ ॥੪॥੫॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: prabh kripaa te sant paae vaar vaar naanak uh berai |4|5|16|
lines.english: By the Grace of God, I have found the Saints. Over and over again, Nanak is a sacrifice to that moment. ||4||5||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਸਰਨ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਤੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: charan saran gopaal teree |
lines.english: I seek the Sanctuary of Your Lotus Feet, O Lord of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਮਾਨ ਧੋਹ ਭਰਮ ਰਾਖਿ ਲੀਜੈ ਕਾਟਿ ਬੇਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: moh maan dhoh bharam raakh leejai kaatt beree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Save me from emotional attachment, pride, deception and doubt; please cut away these ropes which bind me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੂਡਤ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਸਾਗਰ ॥
lines.translit: booddat sansaar saagar |
lines.english: I am drowning in the world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਧਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਰਤਨਾਗਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: audhare har simar ratanaagar |1|
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on the Lord, the Source of Jewels, I am saved. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਤਲਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਤੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: seetalaa har naam teraa |
lines.english: Your Name, Lord, is cooling and soothing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨੋ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: poorano tthaakur prabh meraa |2|
lines.english: God, my Lord and Master, is Perfect. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨ ਦਰਦ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ਤਾਰਨ ॥
lines.translit: deen darad nivaar taaran |
lines.english: You are the Deliverer, the Destroyer of the sufferings of the meek and the poor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਤਿਤ ਉਧਾਰਨ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har kripaa nidh patit udhaaran |3|
lines.english: The Lord is the Treasure of Mercy, the Saving Grace of sinners. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਜਨਮ ਦੂਖ ਕਰਿ ਪਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: kott janam dookh kar paaeo |
lines.english: I have suffered the pains of millions of incarnations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਓ ॥੪॥੬॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: sukhee naanak gur naam drirraaeo |4|6|17|
lines.english: Nanak is at peace; the Guru has implanted the Naam, the Name of the Lord, within me. ||4||6||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਿ ਉਹ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਚਰਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਲਾਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: dhan uh preet charan sang laagee |
lines.english: Blessed is that love, which is attuned to the Lord's Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਜਾਪ ਤਾਪ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਏ ਆਇ ਮਿਲੇ ਪੂਰਨ ਬਡਭਾਗੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kott jaap taap sukh paae aae mile pooran baddabhaagee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The peace which comes from millions of chants and deep meditations is obtained by perfect good fortune and destiny. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਅਨਾਥੁ ਦਾਸੁ ਜਨੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਅਵਰ ਓਟ ਸਗਲੀ ਮੋਹਿ ਤਿਆਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: mohi anaath daas jan teraa avar ott sagalee mohi tiaagee |
lines.english: I am Your helpless servant and slave; I have given up all other support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੋਰ ਭਰਮ ਕਾਟੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਜਨ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੋਵਤ ਜਾਗੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhor bharam kaatte prabh simarat giaan anjan mil sovat jaagee |1|
lines.english: Every trace of doubt has been eradicated, remembering God in meditation. I have applied the ointment of spiritual wisdom, and awakened from my sleep. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਅਥਾਹੁ ਅਤਿ ਬਡੋ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਸਿੰਧੁ ਪੂਰਨ ਰਤਨਾਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: too athaahu at baddo suaamee kripaa sindh pooran ratanaagee |
lines.english: You are Unfathomably Great and Utterly Vast, O my Lord and Master, Ocean of Mercy, Source of Jewels.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜਾਚਕੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਾਂਗੈ ਮਸਤਕੁ ਆਨਿ ਧਰਿਓ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪਾਗੀ ॥੨॥੭॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: naanak jaachak har har naam maangai masatak aan dhario prabh paagee |2|7|18|
lines.english: Nanak, the beggar, begs for the Name of the Lord, Har, Har; he rests his forehead upon God's Feet. ||2||7||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਚਿਲ ਕਠੋਰ ਕਪਟ ਕਾਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: kuchil katthor kapatt kaamee |
lines.english: I am filthy, hard-hearted, deceitful and obsessed with sexual desire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਾਨਹਿ ਤਿਉ ਤਾਰਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jiau jaaneh tiau taar suaamee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Please carry me across, as You wish, O my Lord and Master. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਪ ਤਾਪ ਨੇਮ ਸੁਚਿ ਸੰਜਮ ਨਾਹੀ ਇਨ ਬਿਧੇ ਛੁਟਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jaap taap nem such sanjam naahee in bidhe chhuttakaar |
lines.english: Chanting and deep meditation, penance and austere self-discipline, fasting and purification - salvation does not come by any of these means.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਸਰਨਿ ਜੋਗੁ ਤੂ ਰਾਖਹਿ ਅਪਨੀ ਕਲ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: too samarath saran jog too raakheh apanee kal dhaar |1|
lines.english: You are All-powerful and Potent to grant Sanctuary. Exerting Your Power, You protect us. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਰਤ ਘੋਰ ਅੰਧ ਤੇ ਕਾਢਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਰਿ ॥੨॥੮॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: garat ghor andh te kaadtahu prabh naanak nadar nihaar |2|8|19|
lines.english: Please lift me up and out of this deep, dark ditch; O God, please bless Nanak with Your Glance of Grace. ||2||8||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 5 ghar 4 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਰਾਇਨ ਨਰਪਤਿ ਨਮਸਕਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: naaraaein narapat namasakaarai |
lines.english: The one who bows in humble reverence to the Primal Lord, the Lord of all beings

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੇ ਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈਐ ਆਪਿ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਮੋਹਿ ਤਾਰੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aise gur kau bal bal jaaeeai aap mukat mohi taarai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: - I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice to such a Guru; He Himself is liberated, and He carries me across as well. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਖ ਲਾਖ ਲਾਖ ਕਈ ਕੋਰੈ ਕੋ ਹੈ ਐਸੋ ਬੀਚਾਰੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: laakh laakh laakh kee korai ko hai aiso beechaarai |1|
lines.english: There are thousands, tens of thousands, hundreds of thousands, many millions of them, but those who contemplate them are very rare. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨ ਕਵਨ ਕਵਨ ਗੁਨ ਕਹੀਐ ਅੰਤੁ ਨਹੀ ਕਛੁ ਪਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: kavan kavan kavan gun kaheeai ant nahee kachh paarai |
lines.english: Which, which, which of Your Glorious Virtues should I chant? There is no end or limitation to them.
